# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR adds or changes.

## Type

- [ ] New asset(s)
- [ ] New concept sheet
- [ ] Cropped production asset(s)
- [ ] Prompt update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Metadata update
- [ ] Folder/structure update

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `STYLE_GUIDE.md`
- [ ] Follows `ASSET_NAMING.md`
- [ ] No baked text in image assets
- [ ] No copyrighted logos/characters/assets
- [ ] Correct folder location
- [ ] Reasonable file size
- [ ] Docs updated if structure changed
- [ ] Metadata updated if needed

## Testing / Review

Describe how the assets/docs were checked.

## Screenshots / Preview

Attach preview images if applicable.
